subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Give thanks, for from the chalice of the Friend thou hast quaffed wines tempered with camphor, and from the spring of Tasním [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن از کاس حضرت دوست خمر مزاجها کافورا نوشیدی و بمعین تسنیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
